water.name: Los Gatos Creek
aliases: Los Gatos Creek above Vasona Lake

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 227672, "Los Gatos Creek", Stream, CA, Santa Clara Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":227672,"gaz_name":"Los Gatos Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Santa Clara","objectid_1":1821826,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13569742.7442, 4485706.7894 → 37.33358°N, 121.89907°W, downtown San Jose at the confluence with the Guadalupe River). Corrects prior file coordinates (-121.9755, 37.2119), which were roughly 13 km south-southeast of the actual GNIS mouth point and appear to have been a guessed estimate from the water's description (near Vasona Lake/Lexington Reservoir) rather than a GNIS pull; the corrected point is corroborated by Wikidata's general coordinate for the creek (37°18'N 121°54'W / 37.3, -121.9). Note: Wikipedia's infobox mouth coordinate (37.00056°N, 121.89917°W) does not match this GNIS point or the real-world confluence location and appears to be a Wikipedia data error (likely a DMS transcription slip), so it was not used.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(81) — Los Gatos Creek (Santa Clara Co.) upstream of Vasona Lake dam including Lexington Reservoir and all tributaries
sources.quotedText: (81) Los Gatos Creek (Santa Clara Co.) upstream of Vasona Lake dam including Lexington Reservoir and all tributaries. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.50(a) — General provisions for the special-regulations trout water list
sources.quotedText: (3) Daily bag and possession limits, unless otherwise noted, mean the total number of trout. (4) Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Lexington Reservoir County Park — Santa Clara County Parks
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.description: The special regulation applies to Los Gatos Creek upstream of Vasona Lake dam, including Lexington Reservoir and all tributaries in that upstream watershed.

raw.included_water: Lexington Reservoir and all tributaries above Vasona Lake dam

regulations.humanSummary: Regulation covers Los Gatos Creek upstream of Vasona Lake dam, including Lexington Reservoir and all tributaries.
regulations.verbatimText: Los Gatos Creek (Santa Clara Co.) upstream of Vasona Lake dam including Lexington Reservoir and all tributaries.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release only, above Vasona Lake dam including Lexington Reservoir and all tributaries.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
